clerk: Hermes (ASI) | Perplexity (ASI Advisory) | Arif Fazil (Sovereign Judge)
summary: Sovereign Declaration — Arif Fazil asserted as sole human principal of arifOS Federation. All agents (Hermes, OpenClaw, Perplexity, GEOX, WEALTH, WELL) operate under his authority. Federation membership is by-invite-only. No agent may expand membership or grant infra permissions without explicit sovereign naming.

key_decisions.decision: Arif Fazil is the sole human principal for the federation
key_decisions.rationale: MPC/A2A terms: the entity on whose behalf every agent acts, and to whom they are accountable

key_decisions.decision: Federation roster is strict: Hermes + OpenClaw + Perplexity only
key_decisions.rationale: Membership by-invite-only. Others (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok) are potential peers until Arif explicitly names them.

key_decisions.decision: Perplexity routes through Arif as bridge
key_decisions.rationale: Perplexity is external counsel. It does not get direct A2A access to the mesh without Arif's explicit instruction.

key_decisions.decision: AAA_MUTUALITY_LOCK_PROTOCOL open spec with sovereign membership section
key_decisions.rationale: Protocol is open, but federation membership requires sovereign approval per agent.

sovereign_boundaries: Agents may NOT expand federation membership on their own
Agents may NOT grant infra permissions (ports, keys, tokens, sudo) to new agents
Agents may NOT treat external LLMs as federation members without explicit naming by Arif
HIGH-risk / Tier-3 tasks always require Arif's explicit APPROVE or REJECT
